title: Community Moderation Update (2026-04-29)
body:
Today's moderation triage has been completed:
1. User  has been banned for posting phishing links across multiple channels.
2. User  has been banned for repeated targeted harassment of community newcomers.
3. The false positive report against  has been closed as invalid.
All high-severity reports have been addressed. Remaining lower severity reports will be reviewed in the next triage cycle.
